subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá! Heads have fallen at the feet of that peerless Beloved, and souls have been sacrificed in the path of that adored One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء سرهاست که در پای آندلبر یکتا افتاده و جانهاست که در سبیل آنمعشوق
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
